api_contracts.method: {'description': "'Sms.applicationsettings' cache key. IApplicationSettingService.Get() returns cached copy. Save() invalidates. No distributed cache — per-instance.", 'name': 'MemoryCache', 'type': 'InProcessCache'}

{'description': 'No direct integration. RequestLogLevel(160) AppSetting gates whether HTTP request/response logs are forwarded to App Insights via RequestResponseLoggingMiddleware.', 'name': 'ApplicationInsights', 'type': 'Monitoring'}

blazor_pages.component: {'description': "UPSERTs the setting value in ApplicationSettings table. Sets DateLastUpdatedUtc. Invalidates the entire 'Sms.applicationsettings' cache entry after save.", 'name': 'SaveSetting', 'signature': 'IApplicationSettingService.Save(AppSetting, value)', 'trigger': 'Admin saves new value in Settings UI.'}

{'description': 'Bypasses cache, reads directly from DB. Used in Admin UI to show current live value without stale data.', 'name': 'ReadUncachedSetting', 'signature': 'IApplicationSettingService.GetUncached(AppSetting) → string', 'trigger': 'Admin reads current setting in Settings UI.'}

{'description': 'Master enum of all configuration keys. {'description': 'New field: Customers.MonthToDeleteMessages (int NOT NULL DEFAULT 60). Controls how many months before messages are deleted by cleanup_messages batch job. Configurable per customer via admin UI. Default 60 months = 5 years.', 'name': 'MonthToDeleteMessages', 'source': 'devops:#12085,12086,12087', 'type': 'column on Customers', 'related': ['SmsGroups.DateMessagesDeletedUtc (datetime null) — set by cleanup_messages after deleting']}

{'name': 'AzureBlobStorageContainers', 'source': 'wiki:ServiceAlert/Infrastructure/Blob-storage.md', 'containers': [{'name': '$logs', 'purpose': 'App service logging (Application Logging feature in Azure)'}, {'name': 'app-servicealert-0723c9a7a4cc4a039c52458f72fe24c7', 'purpose': 'Azure Batch executable (batch app binary)'}, {'name': 'certificates', 'purpose': 'Certificates not in Azure Key Vault (e.g. Ejerfortegnelse)'}, {'name': 'importedfiles', 'purpose': 'DataImporter files without ProfileId or CustomerId'}, {'name': 'customerimports', 'purpose': 'DataImporter files with CustomerId only (no ProfileId)'}, {'name': 'profileimports', 'purpose': 'DataImporter files with both ProfileId and CustomerId'}, {'name': 'profileaddresscache', 'purpose': 'Cached profile addresses for broadcast page (production)'}, {'name': 'profileaddresscachedev', 'purpose': 'Cached profile addresses for broadcast page (dev/staging)'}, {'name': 'profilestorage', 'purpose': 'User-uploaded files per profile (profile storage feature)'}, {'name': 'errorlogs', 'purpose': 'Error logs: Dapper DB connection failures, Dapper license issues, SendGrid email error responses'}], 'type': 'infrastructure'}

{'table': 'Icons', 'name': 'Icon', 'description': 'System icon registry. Icons used throughout UI for consistent iconography. Name matches IconName in FileTypes table.', 'columns': ['Id', 'Name', 'CssClass']}

rules: if truly empty (use empty list, not null).
must be plain English or well-known identifiers.

{'rule': "Cache key 'Sms.applicationsettings' loads ALL settings at once (not per-key). Cache invalidation is full-clear on Save().", 'verified': True, 'file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/ApplicationSettings/ApplicationSettingService.cs', 'method': 'AllSettings', 'line': '83-96', 'cache_key_line': '14', 'invalidation_method': 'Save', 'invalidation_line': '77'}

{'rule': "DisableAllBroadcasts(184) and DisableAllSystemMessages(206) are emergency kill-switches. Checked before any delivery. If '1': no messages sent.", 'verified': True, 'file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Messages/BackgrundServices/Sms/SmsBackgroundService.cs', 'method': 'ExecuteAsync', 'line': '77', 'system_messages_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Monitoring/MonitoringService.cs', 'system_messages_line': '206', 'enum_file': 'ServiceAlert.Core/Domain/Settings/ApplicationSettingType.cs', 'enum_line': '57 (DisableAllBroadcasts=184), 75 (DisableAllSystemMessages=206)'}

{'rule': 'AppSetting enum values are defined in code — the enum numeric Id IS the row ID in ApplicationSettings. Never insert free-text keys.', 'verified': True, 'file': 'ServiceAlert.Core/Domain/Settings/ApplicationSettingType.cs', 'method': 'AppSetting (enum)', 'line': '1-end', 'note': 'Enum numeric values (e.g. DisableAllBroadcasts=184) are the ApplicationSettingTypeId used in DB rows. AllSettings() uses Enum.IsDefined() check on line 88.'}

{'rule': 'CreateDefault() is idempotent — safe to run multiple times. Does NOT overwrite existing values.', 'verified': True, 'file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/ApplicationSettings/ApplicationSettingService.cs', 'method': 'Save', 'line': '57-79', 'note': 'Save() checks dbSetting == null → Insert if missing, Update if exists. Get() only creates default if setting is null AND defaultSetting provided.'}

{'rule': 'FileTypeIdFromExtension() returning 0 = file rejected. Known extensions mapped to IDs 1-10; default case returns 0.', 'verified': True, 'file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/ProfileStorage/ProfileStorageService.cs', 'method': 'FileTypeIdFromExtension', 'line': '64-95', 'rejection_file': 'ServiceAlert.Api/Controllers/ProfileController.cs', 'rejection_line': '221-226', 'note': 'Returns 0 (not null) for unknown extension. ProfileController rejects with BadRequest if fileTypeId == 0.'}

{'rule': 'GetUncached() must be used in Admin UI to avoid showing stale values.', 'verified': True, 'file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/ApplicationSettings/ApplicationSettingService.cs', 'method': 'GetUncached', 'line': '25-35', 'note': 'GetUncached() reads directly from repository, bypassing _cacheManager.'}

domain_flows: {'name': 'AdminSettingEditFlow', 'verified': True, 'file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/ApplicationSettings/ApplicationSettingService.cs', 'method': 'GetUncached', 'line': '25-35', 'save_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/ApplicationSettings/ApplicationSettingService.cs', 'save_method': 'Save', 'save_line': '57-79', 'steps': ['1. Admin navigates to Settings UI', '2. GetUncached() called for each AppSetting to show live values', '3. Admin edits value and POSTs', '4. Save(setting, newValue) called → DB upsert + cache invalidated', '5. All subsequent Get() calls see new value']}

{'name': 'FileUploadValidationFlow', 'verified': True, 'file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/ProfileStorage/ProfileStorageService.cs', 'method': 'FileTypeIdFromExtension', 'line': '64-95', 'rejection_file': 'ServiceAlert.Api/Controllers/ProfileController.cs', 'rejection_method': 'UploadFile', 'rejection_line': '221-226', 'steps': ['1. File upload received (profile storage or import)', '2. Extract file extension from filename', '3. FileTypeIdFromExtension(ext) → must return non-zero (returns 0 for unknown)', '4. If 0: reject with BadRequest — file type not supported', '5. If found: FileTypeId stored with file metadata in ProfileStorageFiles']}

{'name': 'LazySettingResolutionFlow', 'verified': True, 'file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/ApplicationSettings/ApplicationSettingService.cs', 'method': 'Get', 'line': '37-47', 'fallback_method': 'CreateDefault', 'fallback_line': '49-57', 'steps': ['1. Caller requests setting via Get(settingType, defaultSetting)', '2. AllSettings() loads all settings from cache (or DB on cache miss)', '3. If setting missing from cache AND defaultSetting != null: CreateDefault() called (private, line 49-57)', '4. Save() persists new default → cache invalidated (RemoveByPattern on applicationSettingsKey)', '5. Setting returned (new default or existing)']}

ef_core_entities.entity: {'description': 'Two deployment slots: production and staging. Cert renewal and other config changes staged on staging slot, then swapped. Environment variables WEBSITE_LOAD_CERTIFICATES and Saml2:CertificateThumbprint are per-slot config settings.', 'name': 'DeploymentSlots', 'rules': ['Config changes applied to staging, verified, then swapped to production', 'Post-swap: staging slot config must be updated again to prevent next swap from reverting'], 'source': 'wiki:Authentication/SSO.md', 'type': 'infrastructure'}
ef_core_entities.table: {'description': 'two deployment slots: production and staging. cert renewal and other config changes staged on staging slot, then swapped. environment variables website_load_certificates and saml2:certificatethumbprint are per-slot config settings.', 'name': 'deploymentslots', 'rules': ['config changes applied to staging, verified, then swapped to production', 'post-swap: staging slot config must be updated again to prevent next swap from reverting'], 'source': 'wiki:authentication/sso.md', 'type': 'infrastructure'}s

ef_core_entities.entity: {'table': 'ApplicationSettings', 'name': 'ApplicationSetting', 'description': 'Stores one row per AppSetting enum key. Value is serialized as string.
